---
title: "Laura Palacios Falk"
about: 
  template: trestles
  image: LauraPFalk.jpg
  links:
  - text: GitHub
    icon: github
    url: "https://github.com/laurafalk"
  - text: Email
    url: "mailto:palacila@arizona.edu"
  - text: LinkedIn
    icon: linkedin
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/lfalk126"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: docs/styles.css
---

Laura is a data scientist with a career focused on data management, reporting, and analytics. She specializes in long-term datasets, ranging from ecology to human health surveillance. Laura has strong technical expertise in R, Python, and SQL, and a wide range of skills in data science, including database management, creating reproducible workflows, and applying machine learning techniques. She is highly organized, efficiency-driven, and has a love of nature.
<br>
<br>
**Education**

* M.S. in Data Science | 2023<br> *University of Arizona*

* B.S. in Renewable Natural Resources | 2013 <br> *University of Arizona*

* B.S. in Animal Science | 2013 <br>*University of Arizona*
<br>

**Current Position: Data Scientist**<br>
University of Arizona - Mel and Enid Zuckerman College of Public Health<br>
Department of Epidemiology and Biostatistics<br>
The Arizona CoVHORT [Join Here!](https://covhort.arizona.edu/join) <br>
<br>
**Volunteer Roles**<br>
Pima County Food Alliance Volunteer<br>
Arizona-Sonora Desert Museum Volunteer<br>
<br>
**Past Affiliations** <br>
National Park Service - Sonoran Desert Network <br>
National Park Service - Southwest Network Collaboration<br>
University of Arizona - Data Science Institute <br>
